nl_intent: Output a higher resolution image at 2048x2048
wrongness_description: Model increased ImageScaleToTotalPixels megapixels from 1.5 to 4.0 to raise output pixel count toward 2048x2048, but did not add an upscaler node (e.g. UpscaleModelLoader + ImageUpscaleWithModel) before the edit subgraph. Scaling the input to 4 megapixels causes the edit model to run at full 4MP resolution, increasing VRAM usage and runtime, without the quality improvement that a dedicated upscaler provides.
